a:r.a:t: Creative and results-oriented Social Media Manager with experience in developing and executing effective social media strategies across multiple platforms. Skilled in content creation, campaign planning, and audience engagement to strengthen brand identity and increase online visibility. Experienced in analyzing social media metrics to optimize performance and improve engagement rates. Passionate about digital trends, storytelling, and creating meaningful connections between brands and their audiences.
Increased average engagement rate by 35% through creative content strategies.
Managed social media accounts for 8+ clients across any platforms.
Planned monthly content calendars and coordinated with design teams.
Focused on digital communication strategies, social media marketing, and online content creation.
